records.pText:
Condition:
Defeat an enemy party of two or more with one attack.

Bonus:
Earn a little more money.

Condition:
Satisfy the condition for Sweeper in at least five battles in a row.

Bonus:
Earn more money.

Condition:
Satisfy the condition for Sweeper in at least ten battles in a row.

Bonus:
Earn a lot more money.

Condition:
Defeat all enemies on the first turn.

Bonus:
Earn a little more experience.

Condition:
Satisfy the condition for 1-turn Victor in at least five battles in a row.

Bonus:
Earn more experience.

Condition:
Satisfy the condition for 1-turn Victor in at least ten battles in a row.

Bonus:
Earn a lot more experience.

Condition:
Win a battle without taking any damage.

Bonus:
Earn a few more job points.

Condition:
Satisfy the condition for Unscathed at least five battles in a row.

Bonus:
Earn more job points.

Condition:
Satisfy the condition for Unscathed at least ten battles in a row.

Bonus:
Earn many more job points.
